zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Breteuil於大約1010年出生在法國布格薩o-吉洛易奧比尼時，他的父親Osbern the Steward de Crépon22歲，母親Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux20歲。他於1051年與Adelise De Toeni在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1107年9月8日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德享年98歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾可麥利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Breteuil于大约1010年出生在法国布格薩o-吉洛易奧比尼时，他的父亲Osbern the Steward de Crépon22岁，母亲Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux20岁。他于1051年与Adelise De Toeni在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1107年9月8日在英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德享年98岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾可麥利斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Breteuil was born about 1010, in Aubigny, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France, his father, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, was 22 and his mother, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, was 20. He married Adelise De Toeni in 1051, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 8 September 1107, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98, and was buried in Cormeilles, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Breteuil est né environ 1010, à Aubigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France, son père, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Adelise De Toeni en 1051, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1107, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Breteuil um 1010 in Aubigny, Saône-et-Loire, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbern the Steward de Crépon 22 und seine Mutter Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux 20. Er hat 1051 in Frankreich Adelise De Toeni geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. September 1107 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Breteuil è nato il circa 1010 nel Aubigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Adelise De Toeni nel 1051, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 settembre 1107, nel Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolto a Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Breteuilが約1010年にフランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアーアウビグニーで生まれた時，父Osbern the Steward de Créponは22歳，母Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeuxは20歳であった。1051年にフランスでAdelise De Toeniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1107年9月8日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで98歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアコルメイレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Breteuil(이)가 대략 1010년 프랑스 부르고그니 사o니-트-로이르 오비그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbern the Steward de Crépon(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1051년 프랑스에서 Adelise De Toeni(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1107년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콜이레스에 묻혔다.

mn.Thetford, Norfolkshire, England: Thetford, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Breteuil nasceu aproximadamente 1010, em Aubigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelise De Toeni em 1051, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1107, em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 98 anos, e foi sepultado em Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Breteuil родился около 1010 г. в местности аубигни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Osbern the Steward de Crépon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelise De Toeni в 1051 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 8 сентября 1107 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности кормиллесь, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Breteuil nació aproximadamente 1010, en Aubigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Osbern the Steward de Crépon, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Emma d’Ivry et de Bayeux, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Adelise De Toeni en 1051, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1107, en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultado en Cormeilles, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
